assertionResults.fullName: ApiService getDashboard returns dashboard data for authenticated user
assertionResults.title: returns dashboard data for authenticated user

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService getDashboard throws error when user is not authenticated
assertionResults.title: throws error when user is not authenticated

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService getDashboard returns default values when no health score exists
assertionResults.title: returns default values when no health score exists

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService getDashboard throws error on database error
assertionResults.title: throws error on database error

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService getAnalytics returns analytics for 7 days period
assertionResults.title: returns analytics for 7 days period

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService getAnalytics returns analytics for 30 days period
assertionResults.title: returns analytics for 30 days period

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService getAnalytics returns empty arrays when no data
assertionResults.title: returns empty arrays when no data

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService getAnalytics throws error when user not authenticated
assertionResults.title: throws error when user not authenticated

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService getRecipes returns recipes list
assertionResults.title: returns recipes list

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService getRecipes returns empty array when no recipes
assertionResults.title: returns empty array when no recipes

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService getExercises returns exercises list
assertionResults.title: returns exercises list

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService checkScanEligibility returns eligibility response when allowed
assertionResults.title: returns eligibility response when allowed

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService checkScanEligibility throws error when not authenticated
assertionResults.title: throws error when not authenticated

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService checkScanEligibility throws error on HTTP error
assertionResults.title: throws error on HTTP error

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService checkScanEligibilityOnly sends checkOnly flag
assertionResults.title: sends checkOnly flag

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService getNextAvailableScanDate returns next available date
assertionResults.title: returns next available date

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService getNextAvailableScanDate returns null on error
assertionResults.title: returns null on error

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService getNextAvailableScanDate returns null when no next_available_date
assertionResults.title: returns null when no next_available_date

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService analyzeScanWithN8n analyzes scan and updates database
assertionResults.title: analyzes scan and updates database

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService analyzeScanWithN8n throws error when user not authenticated
assertionResults.title: throws error when user not authenticated

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService analyzeScanWithN8n throws error when analysis fails
assertionResults.title: throws error when analysis fails

assertionResults.fullName: ApiService analyzeScanWithN8n throws error when analysis returns no data
assertionResults.title: throws error when analysis returns no data

assertionResults.title: returns scan without analysis when analysis fails
